positional_bias.boundary_note: max_share 0.40 == 0.40 threshold; boundary allowed (fail only if > 0.40)

length_bias.note: Correct answers are mid-length; no MCQ has correct > mean(distractors)*1.20.

distractor_plausibility.note: All distractors are on-topic beginner misconceptions (AI ban, data handover, AI tax, mass deletion/reporting, EU verbatim copy, EU membership). None score 1.

objective_coverage.note: All 5 corpus section-3 LOs tested: Q1 MEITY+2024 asks; Q2 advisory vs binding law; Q3 two asks (labeling+due-diligence); Q4 Mar-2024 prior-permission dropped; Q5 directionally aligned. Q6 short-answer = scale-placement recall (corpus 5.5 / Key Takeaways).

count_and_type.note: Atomic depth, include_short_answer=true -> short-answer Q6 present and required.

scope_and_audience.note: No IT Rules 2021 mechanics, no AIGG, no Digital India Act, no 5.13 framework-selection logic. Q6 tests scale placement/recall (government advisory), not a pick-a-framework decision. Acronyms (MEITY, EU AI Act) spelled in-stem; plain beginner stems.

gift_hygiene.note: All 6 blocks titled ::5.12-QN::. '#' appears only as per-answer feedback and '####' general feedback. Q6 escaped colon '\:' and four =-variant short answers (advisory/advisories/Advisory/Advisories). Parses cleanly.

verdict: Pass - positional max_share 0.40 (boundary allowed), no length/distractor bias, all 5 LOs covered, 6 questions (5 MCQ + 1 required short-answer), on-headline scope, clean GIFT.
